new.name: Exploiting-a-vulnerability-using-reverse-shell
new.description: This project simulates a real-world attack-and-defend scenario across two virtual machines. You will exploit a critical pre-authentication RCE vulnerability (CVE-2025-32433) in an Erlang/OTP SSH server, crack extracted password hashes, and then harden the victim machine with firewall rules and patching.
